The LCA compared the environmental impacts of the bamboo cutlery kit as compared to our previous petroleum-based polystyrene cutlery kit, and determined the bamboo cutlery kit has lower environmental impacts on a lifecycle basis than the polystyrene cutlery kit in eight out of 16 of the environmental impact categories studied, including climate change footnote1 and water use. footnote2, footnote3
- In June 2024, we were recognized in the Time 100 Most Influential Companies list for United Airlines Ventures, our first-of-its-kind investment fund dedicated to supporting technologies to help decarbonize aviation one day.
- In May 2024, United Airlines Ventures Sustainable Flight Fund was named the Investing winner of Fast Company s 2024 World Changing Ideas list, recognized for the Fund s forward-looking mission and scalable design.
- In March 2024, we received the No. 2 spot as Fast Company's "World s Most Innovative Companies" award in the Corporate Social Responsibility category.

In some cases, we don t know. In other cases, we have estimates of the dates by which these technologies could become part of our operation which are set forth below, but these are just estimates and not firm guarantees. We re focused on taking thoughtful action today to reduce emissions by investing,on longer term bets that could reimagine how aviation works. Innovation in Aviation and Aerospace The corporate venture fund at United is making investments that aim to redefine commercial air travel for decades, including battery and hydrogen -powered aircraft, electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft and supersonic and blended wing aircraft. We value United States Armed Forces members and veterans and we want them on our team. We ve established strategic career pathway programs and partnerships to create opportunities for veterans and active military personnel, including: United Military Pilot Program (UMPP) to establish a pathway for active-duty military pilots to become United First Officers. Cookies and tracking technologies We and certain third-party service providers and vendors automatically collect information by using technologies and methodologies, such as cookies , pixels, tags, web beacons, local storage objects, or other similar technologies, including but not limited, to session replay code ( Tracking Technologies ) that enable tracking as you browse our websites and apps. Tracking Technologies include code that may place small data files on your computer, tablet, mobile phone, or other devices and that may record certain pieces of information when you visit our websites and apps.
